title: Machine Coding Round 1 — Week 1 Review Build
description: 90-minute timed build from scratch without AI, Google, or copying previous code. Build login, dashboard, sidebar, and navbar using only Week 1 concepts and official documentation.
requirements: Do not use AI tools, Google, or copy-paste from prior FrontForge days
Official React, TypeScript, React Router, and MDN docs only
Scaffold Vite + React + TypeScript fresh or use empty branch — no peeking at old solutions
Login page: email, password, controlled inputs, basic validation, submit handler
After login (simulated OK), navigate to dashboard — useState or router
Dashboard layout with sidebar and navbar persisting across views
At least two navigable sections (e.g. dashboard home, profile) via React Router
Outlet or equivalent nested routing for main content area
Mobile-usable layout — minimal responsive CSS acceptable
acceptanceCriteria: Timer stopped at or before 90 minutes
Login form validates empty fields before proceed
User can reach dashboard after successful login (fake auth OK)
Sidebar links change main content without full page reload
App builds with npm run build
Self-review document lists 3 weak Week 1 topics and 3 strengths
Attempt pushed to Git with tag or branch machine-coding-day07
hints: Minute 0–15: Vite scaffold, folder structure, BrowserRouter skeleton.
Minute 15–40: LoginForm with useState — copy structure from memory, not files.
Minute 40–70: DashboardLayout, Sidebar, Navbar, Outlet, two child routes.
Minute 70–85: Wire login → navigate to /dashboard; fix broken routes.
Minute 85–90: Smoke test, README self-review, git push.
If stuck on routes 10+ minutes, read reactrouter.com Outlet docs only.

bonus.title: Stretch goals (only if time remains)
bonus.description: Extra credit — not required for pass.

debuggingScenarios.title: Running out of time
debuggingScenarios.symptom: 60 minutes in and only login exists
debuggingScenarios.cause: Over-polishing CSS or perfect validation before layout shell
debuggingScenarios.fix: Hard stop at M40 for login — switch to layout + placeholder pages; style later

debuggingScenarios.title: Blank dashboard after login
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Navigate succeeds but white main area
debuggingScenarios.cause: Missing Outlet or route not nested under layout
debuggingScenarios.fix: Check React Router docs — layout Route wraps children with Outlet in same commit

debuggingScenarios.title: Forgot syntax under pressure
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Freeze on useState or Route syntax
debuggingScenarios.cause: Relied on AI during Week 1 daily builds
debuggingScenarios.fix: Official react.dev useState page; write minimal example on paper; continue — partial credit beats blank
